name: Flashback
overview: 20 years ago, 5-year-old Kagami Ryoma saw his father, Ryoichi, murdered right before him. When he touched his father’s dead body, strange images suddenly came to mind. He began to get the residual thoughts that the spirits of the dead possess (flashbacks) when he comes into contact with dead bodies and personal effects.

trailers.title: 【公式】フジテレビ「FLASHBACK」#1 PR SPOT 第1話予告編
